name: humanly
description: Text provenance service for tracking typing activities in external forms and surveys

scripts.setup:local: bash scripts/setup-env.sh && pnpm docker:up && pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:editor
scripts.build:all: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:editor && pnpm build:tracker && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:frontend-user && pnpm build:create-humanly
scripts.clean:ts-artifacts: rm -rf packages/shared/dist packages/editor/dist packages/shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/editor/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/frontend-user/.next
scripts.type-check: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:editor && pnpm --filter @humanly/backend lint && pnpm --filter @humanly/frontend type-check && pnpm --filter @humanly/frontend-user type-check
scripts.test:runnable: pnpm build:shared && pnpm test:backend && pnpm test:frontend-user && pnpm test:create-humanly
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm script:audit && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm test:runnable && pnpm test:audit && pnpm build:all
